title: Peter and Stewie Decode REST vs. GraphQL

dialogue.line: Stewie, what's REST and GraphQL? Some kind of new food?
Oh, Peter! Imagine REST like a buffet, GraphQL like a custom order.
So, one is all-you-can-eat, other is a la carte?
Precisely! REST gives fixed data, no matter your request.
While GraphQL lets you ask for exactly what you need.
Hmm, so more control with GraphQL, right?
Exactly! Like customizing a pizza with just your favorite toppings.
Developers use GraphQL for efficiency, less data, and fewer requests.
Sounds like I'll stick to buffets, but developers like the control!
Yes, Peter. Stick to what you know best - eating!
